auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Cronitor API key used as the HTTP Basic auth username. Create or view keys from the API Settings page in your Cronitor dashboard: https://cronitor.io/app/settings/api.

key.description: The unique key of the Cronitor monitor.

items.description: A Cronitor schedule expression.

schedules.description: The cron expressions, interval expressions, or time schedules for this monitor.

timezone.description: The timezone used to evaluate the monitor schedule.

items.description: A Cronitor assertion expression.

assertions.description: Assertions Cronitor evaluates for this monitor.

items.description: A Cronitor notification list key or integration target.

anyOf.description: Notification list keys or integration targets Cronitor alerts for this monitor.

items.description: A Cronitor notification list key or integration target.

alerts.description: Notification list keys or integration targets Cronitor alerts for this monitor.

run.description: Whether Cronitor should notify when a run event occurs.

complete.description: Whether Cronitor should notify when a complete event occurs.

events.description: Lifecycle telemetry events that should trigger notifications.

notify.description: Cronitor notification list or occurrence-based settings.

note.description: The note attached to the monitor.

platform.description: The platform associated with the monitor.

group.description: The group assigned to the monitor.

method.description: The HTTP method used by Cronitor when checking the URL.

additionalProperties.description: A header value sent by Cronitor.

headers.description: HTTP headers sent by Cronitor when checking the URL.

request.description: The HTTP request configuration used by Cronitor check monitors.

grace_seconds.description: The grace period in seconds before Cronitor marks the monitor failed.

failure_tolerance.description: The number of tolerated failures before Cronitor alerts.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Cronitor monitor.
